task_completion.visual_evidence: The PyMOL application window is open and shows the 4UN3 structure loaded (e.g., '4un3' or '4UN3' is visible in the right-hand object menu).

task_completion.description: Color the four distinct polymer chains distinctly
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 3D structure in the PyMOL viewer shows the four macromolecules (Cas9 protein, sgRNA, Target DNA, Non-target DNA) colored in distinct, easily distinguishable colors.

task_completion.description: Display the PAM nucleotides and interacting Arginines as sticks
task_completion.visual_evidence: Specific residues (Arg1333 and Arg1335) and the 3-nucleotide PAM sequence on the non-target DNA strand are rendered using the 'sticks' representation in the PyMOL viewer, highlighting their interaction.

task_completion.description: Render and save a high-resolution PNG figure
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal, file manager, or PyMOL command line shows that a PNG file was saved to '/home/ga/PyMOL_Data/images/cas9_pam_recognition.png'.

task_completion.description: Write a structural report with chain mapping, residue numbers, and PAM sequence
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal output shows the contents of '/home/ga/PyMOL_Data/cas9_pam_report.txt' containing the correct chain mapping (Cas9=B, sgRNA=A, Target DNA=C, Non-target DNA=D), the Arginine residues (1333, 1335), and the exact PAM sequence (TGG).

integrity.description: Agent interacted with PyMOL to analyze the structure
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent actively using the PyMOL GUI or PyMOL command line to fetch/load the PDB, change colors, and modify representations, rather than just downloading a pre-made image.

integrity.description: The saved figure corresponds to the PyMOL session
integrity.visual_evidence: The visual state of the molecules in the PyMOL viewer matches the description of the figure to be saved (distinct chain colors, sticks for PAM and Arginines).

integrity.description: Agent derived the report information from the structure
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen inspecting the sequence, clicking on residues to identify them, or using PyMOL commands to find chain IDs and sequences before writing the report.

privileged_info_for_vlm: PDB ID: 4UN3. Expected chain mapping: Cas9=B, sgRNA=A, Target DNA=C, Non-target DNA=D. Expected PAM-interacting residues: Arg1333 and Arg1335. Exact PAM sequence on the non-target strand: TGG.
